author: y4rr
content: FIXED: Removed false §3 violation from blas.rs module docstring. The doc claimed silent CPU fallback + eprintln! on cuBLAS handle failure. Production code never had this; the doc was wrong. Replaced with explicit error-policy section: cuBLAS failures propagate as Err(GpuError::Blas(...)), no CPU fallback, matching PyTorch's RuntimeError behaviour. Three test eprintln! calls remain in #[test] functions (perf logging only — acceptable). Workspace build + clippy -D warnings clean.
